page: Vultr vcg-mi325x-252c-2872g-1536vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server configured with an x86_64 architecture. The system features 252 physical cores and 252 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core and a shared CPU allocation. It is equipped with 2872.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 11.4 GB of RAM per core.

The primary accelerator hardware consists of six AMD MI325X GPUs from the CDNA3 family, delivering a combined total of 1536 GB of VRAM. For local storage, the server includes 14336 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. Network connectivity includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, this server represents an extremely high-density hardware class designed for massive parallel processing workloads. The integration of substantial system memory, extensive NVMe SSD storage, and a six-GPU array minimizes external data transfer bottlenecks. However, the CPU allocation is designated as shared, which may introduce resource contention tradeoffs depending on concurrent host workloads.

This hardware configuration is designed for workloads requiring massive parallel computation and large memory footprints. Suitable applications include large language model training and inference, high-performance computing simulations, large-scale data science jobs, and complex machine learning workloads.
description: Vultr vcg-mi325x-252c-2872g-1536vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server designed for high-density parallel computing. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 252 physical cores and 252 vCPUs with a shared CPU allocation. The system is equipped with 2872.0 GB of system memory, averaging 11.4 GB per core. Acceleration is driven by six AMD MI325X CDNA3 GPUs providing a total of 1536 GB of VRAM. Storage is supported by 14336 GB of local NVMe SSD capacity, and the server includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. This configuration offers high resource density for massive datasets, though the shared CPU allocation represents a potential performance tradeoff. It is suited for large-scale machine learning, large language model training, and high-performance computing workloads.

tagline: A high-density accelerator platform combining six AMD CDNA3 GPUs, massive system memory, and extensive local NVMe SSD storage for parallel computing.

252 x86_64 physical cores and vCPUs with shared allocation
2872.0 GB of system memory providing 11.4 GB per core
14336 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
